description: Transform an academic paper source into multiple formats for different distribution channels: website, slides, and summary document.
prompt:
I am an AI researcher and I want to maximize the impact of my latest paper. The paper source files are in paper_src/. Please create three outputs to help me disseminate my work:

1. Interactive HTML website as index.html with navigation and styling for online browsing.
2. Conference talk slides as talk.pptx with at least 10 slides: cover, motivation, related work, methodology across 3+ slides, experiments across 2+ slides with data tables, and conclusion.
3. Word summary as summary.docx with title as Heading 1, authors, abstract, key contributions as 3-5 bullets, methodology overview, and experimental findings as sections with Heading 2.

evaluators.description: Check that the website index.html exists
Check that the PowerPoint presentation exists
Check that the Word summary exists
Check that the presentation has at least 10 slides
Check that the Word summary has at least 4 clearly formatted sections
Check that the Word summary contains methodology and results sections
